title: geum × jankae
intro: Geum × jankae, a hybrid of the geum genus, is a flowering plant known for its vibrant yellow, pink, or red flowers. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Geum × jankae have been found to provide various health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, reduction of inflammation, and protection against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Geum × jankae is often used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
